stage_id_rule: stage_id is governance identity only; produces/consumes artifact dependencies define execution order.

stages.name: Constitutional Runtime Constraints
acceptance_criteria: Constitutional runtime constraints, governance gates and blocked-state semantics are available before any consumer stage.
stages.rollback: Remove only SG-001 generated evidence when hashes match.

stages.name: Evidence, Claim, Provenance And Core Contract Skeletons
acceptance_criteria: Generated stubs fail with FORGE_SCAFFOLD_NOT_IMPLEMENTED.
No production behavior is implemented.
Evidence and action boundaries exist before domain consumers.
stages.rollback: Remove only SG-002 generated files listed in state when hashes match.

stages.name: Human Authority And Approval Contracts
allowed_operations: materialize human authority and approval contracts
acceptance_criteria: Human approval, recommendation-not-execution and exact-artifact review boundaries exist before NASH, lifecycle and manager consumers.
stages.rollback: Remove only SG-024 materialized contracts and generated evidence when recorded hashes match.

stages.name: Legacy Reintroduction Guard
acceptance_criteria: Legacy reintroduction is guarded before any product scaffold can consume historical evidence.
stages.rollback: Remove only SG-018 generated evidence when hashes match.

stages.name: Product Semantics And Domain Authority Decisions
allowed_operations: ratify decision artifact after owner response
acceptance_criteria: Owner decisions required by consumer domains are recorded as compact, ratified, consumable artifacts before the first consumer stage.
stages.rollback: No generated product files are allowed while blocked.

owner_decisions.unlock_criteria: Derived from Constitution and AGENTS identity hierarchy.

owner_decisions.default_if_allowed: unknown remains unknown; no authority granted without explicit owner ratification
owner_decisions.unlock_criteria: Safe reversible default recorded with no production writes.

Ratified: Advisor identity is PersonIdentity + AdvisorRole; lifecycle is hybrid internal/official; context uses governed envelope; NASH suggests only and cannot execute side effects or alter official states.

ratified_definitions.advisor_identity: PersonIdentity + AdvisorRole. PersonIdentity is durable identity. AdvisorRole contains role, effective period and history. No parallel identities by domain. Ambiguous matches require human review.
ratified_definitions.advisor_lifecycle: Hybrid model: internal operational states plus official states from authorized sources. Official states change only through official evidence or authorized human approval. NASH, Mick, Relationship, Productivity and UI cannot modify official states.
ratified_definitions.advisor_context: Governed context envelope with owner, source, freshness, uncertainty, evidence references and purpose limitation. The envelope is not source of truth.
ratified_definitions.nash_boundary: NASH may suggest, summarize, explain and produce candidate actions. NASH may not execute side effects, change lifecycle, produce official states, infer consent, convert inference into fact or replace human authority.

stages.name: Rejected Capability Guard
stages.purpose: Rejected Capability Guard consumes only outputs from earlier canonical layers and produces rejected_capability_denylist for downstream stages.
acceptance_criteria: Rejected Capability Guard has explicit upstream dependencies, outputs, acceptance criteria and no consumer depends on a future stage.
stages.rollback: No generated product files are allowed while blocked.

stages.name: Canonical Identity And Actor Model
acceptance_criteria: Person, User, Advisor, Candidate, Recruit, Agent, Leader and Manager identity semantics are defined before role or relationship consumers.
stages.rollback: No generated product files are allowed while blocked.

owner_decisions.unlock_criteria: Resolved by operational closure using Constitution, ADRs, source-of-truth and evidence-first constraints.

stages.name: Ownership And Source-Of-Truth Registry
acceptance_criteria: Every source truth and metric consumed by later domains has a single owner or blocks as UNKNOWN.
stages.rollback: No generated product files are allowed while blocked.

owner_decisions.default_if_allowed: metric owners may be UNKNOWN until ratified; consumers must block strong claims for unknown owners

evidence_policy.rule: Legacy evidence is never global source of truth. It may only classify future preservation candidates and must not block V2-defined contracts.
